creator: tobik@freebsd.org
text:
Hi,

it has unfortunately been a year.  Play 1.4.5 or 1.5.0 are the newest
versions.  If this new port request is still relevant, can you

- update it to a newer version?
- do some QA (i.e. does it pass poudriere testport and portlint)?

There are some other issues to address too:

- Documentation is installed DATADIR, but it should go to DOCSDIR
- Do we really need to install the source code too?

Thanks!
